title: Xylitol Sweet Japanese Mars Bar Pudding
description: A winey and light Japanese dessert featuring Mars bar, made with xylitol for a diabetic-friendly option, served in individual mini cocottes.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Whisk together the xylitol, heavy cream, whole milk, egg yolks, vanilla extract, and kosher salt in a medium bowl.
Add the chopped Mars bars to the bowl and whisk until well combined.
Stir in the mirin and sake.
Pour the mixture into 4 individual mini cocottes.
Place the cocottes in a large baking dish and add hot water to come halfway up the sides.
Bake for 25 minutes or until the edges are set and the centers are still slightly jiggly.
Remove the cocottes from the water bath and let cool to room temperature.
Cover and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
